name: Gift Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, pudding mix, water, eggs, and oil in a large mixing bowl.
2. Blend the ingredients together.
3. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer for 4 minutes.
4. Stir in 1 1/2 cups coconut.
5. Pour into a greased and floured 13 x 9 inch cake pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes or until the cake begins to pull away from the sides.
7. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan and finish cooling on a rack.
9. Cut into two 6 x 8 inch layers.
10. Fill with preserves and 1 cup of the topping; frost with remaining topping.
11. Mark "ribbon" with wooden picks.
12. Tint 2/3 cup of the coconut with food coloring and 1 teaspoon water.
13. Place in the "ribbon" area.
14. Edge with gumdrop strips, if desired.
15. Sprinkle with remaining coconut over the rest of the cake.
16. Garnish with a gumdrop bow made from flattened gumdrops and a rolling pin on a pastry board.
